0.name: Prof. Candice
0.text: Everyone! This is Perry, your new classmate. Get along now, you all!

3.name: Prof. Candice
3.text: Let's begin our next lecture by discussing one of the fundamentals.

4.name: Prof. Candice
4.text: Newton's First Law of Motion states that...

5.name: Prof. Candice
5.text: An object at rest tends to stay at rest and an object in motion tends to stay in motion unless acted upon a force.

6.name: Prof. Candice
6.text: It basically implies that when there's zero force acting on an object at rest it will not move.

7.name: Prof. Candice
7.text: However, if the object is at a constant velocity, it will not change its velocity.

9.name: Prof. Candice
9.text: Why don't you give us a little demonstration right here by pushing this chair over to the side?

10.name: Colin
10.text: * She sure is picking on me... *
